title: What Are Claude Skills? (Explained in 30 Secs )
summary: Claude Skills are built-in abilities that let Claude perform tasks instantly without setup, such as summarizing PDFs. Users can create custom skills to enforce fixed output formats, making Claude faster and more consistent for workflows.
